The Quebec Gazette . GEORGE PREVOST . [ N ° . 2551. ] Gazette de Québec . JEUDI LE 6 JANVIER , 1814 . THURSDAY , JANUARY 6 , 1814 . MAY next , at TEN of the clock in the formoon , at which WHEREAS , the Co - partnership heretofore subasting bet- time and place the conditions of sale will be made known . FRED . W. ERMATINGER , Sheriff drick McKenzie , Angus Show , Archibald Norman McLend , Wine , Window Glass , 50 Hhds , assorted Glauware , and ween William McGillivray, William Hallowell Ro- FOR SALE , No. 50 , Saint Peter Street . SINGLE and Double Gloucester CHEESE , 1 Pipe Port Quebec , 29th Decr . 1813 GILBERT HENDERSON . FOR SALE by the subscribers , and now landing from en board the York , Wm . Cavan , master . 109 Puncheons Jamaica Spirits All and every person or persons having claims on the and James Hallowell , junior , of Montreal , in the Province of a quantity of assorted Hardware , & c . & c . bove described land and premises , by mortgage , or other Lower - Canada , and Simon M’Gillivray , of the City of Lon- right or incumbrance , are hereby advertised to give notice don , under the Firm of McTavish , McGillivrays and Compa- thereof to the said Sheriff , at his Office , in the City ny , ceased , and expired on the Thirtieth Day November Montreal , according to Law ; and further that no opposition last , according to the articles of Co - partnership afin d’annuller or afin de distraire , the whole or any part of the said land and premises , or afin de charge or servitade on the same , will be received by the said Sheriff , during the fifteen days previous to the sale thereof . Sheriff’s Office , 25d December , 1819 . By virtue of a WRIT of EXECUTION to wit : PUBLIC NOTICE is hereby given , that the concern and business , formerly carried on , by the above mentioned house , will here - with be transacted by the said William McGillivray , the said Archibald Normah McLeod , the said Simon M’cGilli- vray , and John McTavish , under the former firm of McTAVISH , McGILLIVRAYS & Co. Montreal , Ist . December , 1815 . Bench, holding civil pleas,  in and for  the  District of Montreal CORK Rose Butter , Cheshire Cheese , EORGE THE THIRD , by the Grace of Gon , Montreal based out of His Majesty’s Court of King of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland , Beef , Purk , Hams , Tongues , & c . Jamaica Ruin and Coffee , Earthenware , Glassware , Cariole , Wheel and Nail Iron , Cordage , Hyson , Singlo , and Souchong Tea , A few of Pins and Thread , " Lawrence Suburbs , of Montreal aforesaid bounded in  the front Hardware - Cross Cut and Hand Saws , Maryland Tobacco , Military Shoes and Hose , For Sale , Apply to 16th December , 1819 . ON SALE . LIVERPOOL Salt , Earthenware amorted , Spanish Red Wine , Port Wine , Real old Cogniac Brandy , Strong Jamaica Rum , Claret , Writing and Blotting Paper , Calf and Kip Leather , Leather Portmanteaus , JAMES HEATH . King , Defender of the Faith : To bur much beloved and faith - aforesaid , at the suit of Alexander Henry , of Montreal , Auctio ful the Legislative Councillors of our Province of Lower - Ca- nada , and to our faithful and well beloved the Knights , Citi - against the lands and tenements of Antoine Badel dit Du- neer , , zens and Burgesses of our said Province , Greeting - Whereas red ; I have seized and taken in execution as belonging to the the meeting of our Provincial Parliament stands prorogued to said ANTOINE BADEL DIT DUFORT . - 1 . A lot of ground the Thirty - firsg Day of December instant , nevertheless for certain causes and considerations , we have thought fit further or emplacement , situated in the third Street , in Cross the Saint to prorogue the same to the Thirteenth Day of January by the said Street , in the rear by Joseph Vallée , on the south next , so that you nor any of you on the said Thirty - first east side , by the heirs of the late , the Honorable Arthur Di- day of December , at our City of Quebec to appear are to be vidson , and on the south - west side , in part by a lot of ground , held or constrained , for we do will that you and each of you forty - feet square , herein after described , belonging to the said be as to us in this matter entirely exonerated ; Commanding , Antoine Badel dit Dufors , and in part by the heirs of Lebrun , and by the tenor of these Presents firmly enjoining you , and containing forty feet in front on the said Street , by forty feet every of you , and all others in this behalf interested , that on in depth , and from thence eighty feet in width , by ninety feet the said Thirteenth Day of January next , at our City of Que further in depth , forming one hundred and thirty feet in depth bec , personally you be and appear , FOR THE DISPATCH OF BU- on the line adjoining the said heirs of the late Arthur Davidson , siness , to treat , do , act and conclude upon those things which in and ninety feet in depth on the line adjoining the said heirs Le- our said Provincial Parliament by the Common Council of our brun , from the extremity of the said lot , to the said lot of ground said Province , by the favour of God , may be ordained . In Tes herein after described , with a house thereon erected . - 2 . Abo- timony whereof , these our Letters we have caused to be made ther lot of ground or emplacement situated in the said third Patent , and the Great Seal of our said Province to be thereunto Cross Street , in the Saint Lawrence Suburbs of Montreal afore- affixed - Witness , our trusty and well beloved SIR GEORGE said , containing forty feet in front by forty feet in depth , Provost , Baronet , Captain General and Governor in Chief of bounded in the front by the said street , in the rear , and on our said Province of Lower - Canada , & c . & c & c . at the Castle one side to the north east , by the lot of ground above des- of St. Lewis , in our City of Quebec , and the Province aforesaid , cribed , and on the other side to the south west , by the said the Twenty - first day of December in the year of our Lord one Heirs of Lebrun , with a house and stable thereon erected ; the thousand eight hundred and thirteen , and in the fifty - fourth said last mentioned lot of ground and premises , to be sold re- year of our Reign serving to Charlotte Contois , widow St. Jean , the possession and enjoyment thereof during her life . Now I do hereby give notice , that the said lots of ground or emplacements and premises will be sold and adjudged to the highest bidder , at the SECOND day of MAY next , at TEN of the Clock in the forenoon , at which time and place the conditions of sale will be made known . FREDK . W. ERMATINGER , Sheriff . TRUNK marked triangle A , M. 45 , containing La- All and every person or persons having claims on the above A dies Slippers - was landed on Messrs , J. W. Wooley & described lots of ground or emplacements and premises , by mort - Co’s Wharf , from on board the Britannia Sno , Storrat , from gage or other right or incumbrance , are hereby advertised to give notice thereof to the said Sheriff , at his Office aforesaid , Tenders will be received at this Office on or before the according to Law ; and further that no oposition afin d’annuller 25th January , for the whole , or part of the above supply in or afin de distraire , the whole or any part of the said lots of quantities not less than Fifty Barrels . - Security will be re - ground or emplacements and premises , or afin de charger or ser- quired . vitude on the same , will be received by the said Sheriff , during Commisary General’s Office , the fifteen days previous to the sale thereof . Sheriff’s Office , 23d December , 1813 . HERMAN W. RTLAND , C. C in Ch . G. P W THREE THOUSAND BARRELS PRIME OR my Office in the City of Moutreal afore said , on MONDAY GOVERNMENT CONTRACT . ANTED for the supply of His Majesty’s Forces , MESS PORK , to be delivered at the King’s Stores in MONTREAL , on or before the 15th June next. The Pork to be cured , packed , and inspected in the man- ner directed by Law , the bungs covered with Tin , brand ed with the Initials of the furnisher , and the letter W underneath , warranted to keep good and sound for Twelve Months after delivery . Quebec , 25th December , 1813 } NOTICE SUBSCRIPTION has been opened for the Relief of the MONTREAL Y virtue of a WRIT of EXECUTION , B to wit : issued out of His Majesty’s Court of King’s A Widows and Orphans of Soldiers who have fallen in Bench , holding civil pleas , in and for the District of Montreal aforesaid , at the suit of Felix Souligny , of Montreal , Merchant , against the lands and tenements of James M Callum , of the Ci ty of Quebec , in the District of Quebec , now of the City of Montreal , in the District of Montreal , to me directed ; I have Canada , in the service of their Country , and also for the Wives and Children , now at Quebec , of Soldiers absent on duty , who at this inclement Season are suffering from want of comfortable Clothing , and such other supplies as Sick- ness and Infancy may require . A Subscription Peper has been left , and subscription will McCall taken The following lots of land, situate, lying and be received at the Office of the Military Secretary ; -This Charity is intended to be Administered in essential Articles of comfort , and not in Money . Soup in Boxes , 10 Pipes strong Cognise Brandy , 12 Pipes Port Wine , 80 Hogsheads 1 eneriffe , sugars chocolate , 13 Cases Irish Linens and Cotton Shirtings ALSO IN STORE , Copper bolts , bar iron , Muscovado few casks whitening and pipe clay . Quebec , 12th Novr . 1815. 1. W. WOOLSEY & Co. FOR SALE , received by the Subscriber , by the late ar- rivals from London and Liverpool , and for Sale at his Store on St. Andrew’s Wharf ; best superfine Navy blue , black , bottle and mixed cloths , ditto military grey , Brus- els carpeting , elegant patterns ; common ditto , do do . Bea- ver and other gloves , best White Chapel needles , darning do . sail kuitting do . best cast steel Kirby fish hooks , a few elegant Silver Epaulets . He has on hand Eau de Cologne in boxes of 6 bottles , 4 barrels cream of tarter , a few barrels of white boiling peas , real Coignac brandy in small lots , chamber and blacksmith coals , La . DELAMARE . Quebec , 4th Novr . 1815 . FOR Sale by FRANCOIS QUIROUET , at . Pert 200 Chaldron best New Castle coals , 50 Kegs white paint , 40 Kegs green paint , blue , & c . 15 Crates soup plates , 8 Hogsheads Herefordshire cyder , 15 Casks assorted cut glass ware , 3 Sacks fresh hops , 10 Puncheous strong Jamaica spirits , which he will dispose of law for cash . Quebec , 3d Novr . 1813 . N Linen , coarse and fine , in pieces from 6 yards each sugar , coffee in tierces , and two hands first quality James to 50 , & c . Linen Shirts , coarse and fine . Linen and Cotton Thread , white and colored . Table Linen , Harness , Saddles and Bridles , Boots , and patent Boot Tops . Superfine and fine Coats and Waistcoats , Stocking web Pantaloons . St Peter Street , Decr . 1 , 1813 W. MAGEE , Jr. & Co. MISSING Greenock . Whoever may have the said Trunk , are requested to deliver to the Subscriber , who will pay all reasonable charges since being landed . 22d Decr . 1813 T M. CAMPBELL , HE Term of Partnership of W. Henderas & Co , of Quebec , and Hedron , Armour & Co. of Montreal , expired the 1st ultimo . Mr. RoasET ARMOUR is empower’d to settle all Accounts at Montreal , and Mr. JAMES HENDER SON at Quebec . Wm . HENDERSON , by his Attorney , JAMES HENDERSON . ROBERT ARMOUR , JAMES HENDERSON . Quebec , 1st Decr . 1813 , HE SUBSCRIBER HAS FOR SALE : Old PORT WINE , 10 M. Standard STAVES , And a Few Tons of COALS . Quebec , 1st Dec. 1813 . M. CAMPBELL . J. MOORE’S BOARDING HOUSE , Cul - de Sac Street , No. 5. - Three or four Gentlemen may be genteely accomo- seized  and taken in execution as belonging to the said JAMES being in the Township of Sherrington , in the said District of Montreal , to wit : lors numbers six , seven , eight , ten , eleven , and thirteen , in the fourth range of lots in the said Township Quebec , 28th December , 1813 . of Sherrington ; lots numbers six , eight , nine , ten , twelve , thir teen , fifteen , sixteen , seventeen , nineteen , and twenty , in the MONTREAL Y virtue of a WRIT of EXECUTION is Bench , holding civil pleas , in and for the District of Mon- numbers seven , eight , nine , eleven , , four teen , fifteen , treal , aforesaid , at the suit of Patrick Phelan , of Montreal , sixteen, , eighteen and nineteen, in the sixth range of lots  in the twelve in the said district , yeoman , against the lands and tenements said Township of Sherrington ; lots number eight , nine , ten , of Samuel Borriadge , late of Latortue in the Seigniory of twelve , , , Lasalle , in the said district , yeoman , to me directed ; I have rang e  of lots in the thirteen , fifteen, sixteen, and nineteen, in the seventh seized and taken in execution as belonging to the said SAM- ber in the said Township of Sherrington ; and lot numb- UEL BURRIADOE L.A lot of land seventeen said seventh range of lots with the excep- in the and Seignory of Lasalle, and formerly making part of or parcel situated tion of seven acres in the north easterly corner thereof . New the domain thereof , in the parish of Saint Philip , in the said and adjudged to the highest bidder , at my Office , in the City district , containing three arpents in front by thirty arpents in of Montreal aforesaid , an MONDAY the SECOND day of depth , bounded in the front by the river Latortue ,in the MAY next , at ELEVEN of the Clock in the forenoon , at rear by the lands of Saint André , on one side to the north which time and place the conditions of sale will he made known . east by Daniel Stewart , and on the other side by the land next hereinafter described , with a stone house , harn , stable and other buildings thereon erected - 2 . A lot of land si- tuated in the said parish of Saint Philip , adjoining the land above described , containing one arpent in front , by about thirty- nine arpents in depth , bounded in the front by the said riv- er Latortue , in the rear by the said lands of Saint André , on one side by the said land above described , and on the -o- ther side by Mr. Fuller - 3 . A lot of land commonly cal led a wood lot , situated in the said parish of Saint Philip , con- taining three arpents in front , by about twenty - six arpents ip depth , bounded in the front by Henry Le Claire , in the rear by the lands of Latortue , on one side by Jean Baptise Rouillé , dit Commercy , and on the other side by Alexis La Cavée , dit Hamelin . Now I do hereby give notice that the said lots of land and premises will be sold and adjudged to the highest bidder , at the church door of the parish of Saint Philip , a foresaid , on MONDAY the SECOND day of MAY next , at TEN of the clock in the forenoon , at which time and place the conditions of sale will be made known . to wit . B sued out of His Majesty’s Court of King’s fifth range of lots in the said Township of Sherrington ; lots dated with boarding and lodging on reasonable terms. FREDE . W. ERMATINGER , Sheriff . FREDE , W. ERMATINGER , Sheriff . J. MOORE returns thanks to his friends and the public , for the very liberal encouragement he has hitherto received in his line of business as a TAYLOR , and hopes by his future exertions to merit their approbation . lately Quebec , 23d . December , 1813 . COLTMANSHALE HAVE FOR SALE , BEST New-Castle coals, at the Wharf No 1 , St. Peter’s Street , the Sails , Rigging , and other Stores , complete , belonging to the Brig Nancy , about 150 tons register . A patent Windlass for a vessel of 300 to 400 tubs , A Set composition Rudder Igons do . 2 Tons Lignum Vita , 2 Oakum , T Copper Bolts and Nails , 2 All and every person or persons having claims on the above described lots of land , by mortgage or other right or incum brance , are hereby advertised to give notice thereof to the said Sheriff , at his Office aforesaid , according to Law ; and further that no opposition afin d’annuller or afin de distraire , the whole or any part of the said lots of land , or afin de charge or servitude dry other articles adapted to Ship building . on the same , will be received by the said Sheriff , during the fifteen days previous to the sale thereof . Sheriff’s Office , 23d December , 1813 . BY virtue of a WRIT of EXECUTION MONTREAL 2 Round and square Iron , Capston Spindle , Windlass Necks , A Set of Pump Geer , Blocks of various sizes , and min- TO WIT ALSO A few pipes Port Wine , Quebec , 9th Decr . 1813 . FOR SALE BY THE SUBSCRIBERS issued our of His Majesty’s Court of ONE Hundred and fifiy Pancheons Grenada and St. Vin- King’s Bench , holding civil pleas , in and for the District of Montreal , aforesaid , at the suit of Pierre Berthelet , of the City of Montreal , in the said district , merchant , against the lands and tenements of the vacant succession of Amos Brown- son , Junior , decesed , in his life time of the same place , Tra- der , in the hands of Joseph Desautels , also of the same place , Public Notary , as Curator duly appointed to the said vacant succession , to me directed ; I have seized and taken in exe- cution as being lands and tenements belonging to the said va- All and every person or persons having claims un the a - catt succession of the said AMOS BROWNSON , Junior , bove described lots of land and premises , by mortgage , or o in the hands of the said Joseph Desautels , as Curator as a ther right or incumbrance , are hereby advertised to give no foresaid ; -All that certain piece of ground or emplacement tice thereof to the said Sheriff , at his Office , in the City of situated in Notre Dame Street , in the City of Montreal , a- Montreal , according to Law ; and further that no opposition foresaid , containing in front , fifty feet , by bae hundred and afin d’annuller or afin de distraire , the whole or any part of the said lots of land and premises , or afin de charger or servi- tude on the same , will be received by the said Sheriff dur- ing the fifteen days previous to the sale thereof , Sheriff’s Office , 23d December , 1815 . BY virtue of a WRIT of EXECUTION eighty feet in depth , without guarantee as to the exact mea- sure , bounded in the front by the said street Notre Dame , in the rear by the glacis , ( with reserve of the King’s rights ) joining on one side to Alexander Henry , Esquire , and all the other side , to Dominique Rousseau , with a two story stone house thereon erected , and the right of pange in the gate- cent Rums 30 ) do . very strong Jamaica Spirits , 20 hands , and 50 barrels Muscovado Sugar , 9 do . Loaf Sugar , 16 cases superior Claret , in not less than 2 doz . Few doz . Martinique Liqueurs , 300 French Burr - Stones , 20 bags good old Coffee , 6 cases of Soap , 150 pair of White Ash Oars , squared & some ready made , Large Table and West - India Cod Fish , Puncheons Leeward Island Rumi , ten bbls . muscovado CHA . F. AYLWIN . River Leaf Tobacco . Nov. 3 , 1815 . A FOR SALE , CHOICE Assortment of 4-4 and 7-8 Irish LINENS , ANDW . MOIR Queen’s Wharf . Quebec , 19th August , 1815 . Province of Lower Canada , IN THE KING’S BENCH . District of Quebec . WEDNESDAY , 20th Octr . 1813 , RDERED , that all persons having any claims or demands against the said WILLIAM THOMP son , the elder , do syle the same in the Office of the Prothonotaries of this Court , on or before the First day of February next , with such proofs thereof , as they may be advised , for such proceedings thereon , as to Law and Justice may appertain . PERRAULT & ROSS , P. B. R. DONALD GRANT Plaintiff GEORGE STANLEY of the City of Quebec , Boot and Shoe - maker , Curator , duly appointed in Law to WILLIAM THOMPSON the elder of the same Ci ty of Quebec , Tavern- Keeper , interdicted for cause of insanity . Province of Lower - Canada , District of Quebec . GEORGE GLENNY , IN THE KING’S BENCH . WEDNESDAY , 20th Octr . 1815 Plaintif having claims or demands THOMAS WHITE Cura - gainst the vacant Estate and sac tur to the vacant Estate cession of the said late JAMES and succession of JAMES GLENSY , do syle the same in the GLENNY , late of the City Office of the Prothonotaries of uf Quebec , Merchant . this Court , on or before the First day of February arst , with h proofs thereof , as they may be ad- vised , for such proceedings thereon , as to Law and Justice may appertain NOW Defendant . By the Court , PERRAULT & ROSS , P. B. R. landing from Brig Cassicks , and for sale by the Subscriber . da 130 Puncheons strong and fine favored Jamaica Rum , 25 Do. high proof Leewards do 15 Pipes Sicilian Wine - otherwise called Bronti Madeira , 10 Hhds . fine York and James River Tobacco , 60 Baskets fine old Cheshire & Glouster Cheese , 54 Crates of assorted Earthen Ware . A few Casks 16 Board , & 24 Covering Nalls , An assortment of Boys Shoes , Black Lead Ground , 140 Ton white Liverpool Salt . 7 Chaldrone Canal Coal ALSO , IN STORE A Choice Assortment of Ribbons , Sewing Silks , and Twist mix’d fine Beaver and silk Hats , Boiled Linseed Oil in Hhds , and Jars , Whiting , Crown Blue , Cordage from 12 thread to 9 inch . Bar Irun . - Five casks assorted Glass Ware . 60 Barrels picked Salmon and 50 Barrel pickled Herrings Quebec , 1st Yov . 1813 . GEORGE SYMES , NOW LANDING FROM SALUS , & FOR SALE , So Tierces Rice , 50 Tons Blacksmiths Coals , 5 Boxes Cambric Muslins , and a few packages Household Furniture , ALSO - Landing out of Brigs ALLEENDE & DISPATCH → & Boxes S. Ge Cotton Shirting , 20 Cases fancy printed Calicous , 3 Bales mix’d Kerseymeres , 3 Bales white Flannels . The whole of which will be sold low for Cash , or at short GEO SYMES 10 dozen best Florence Oil , and a few bushels best boi - credit . ling Pease ... For Cash or Short Credit Quebec , 9th Decr . 1815 . BREHAUT & SHEPPARD , FOR SALE , SPANISH Wine in pipes , Port Wine bottled , in casks of 6 dozen , Ditto in pipes , Hollands Gin of a superior quality , Coniac Brandy , Jamaica Spirits , Leaf Tobacco , Refined Sugar , Window Glass 1-2 by 7-1-2 , Irish Linens , Quebec , 5th . Nov , 1813 . JUST ARRIVED per Ship ROBERT , and for Sale by the Subscribers , Four Bales real Superfine , Blue , Black , brown and mis’t Cloth , also common ditto of different colours , at a reduced price for Cash or approved Credit - also 1 Suit of Sails for a Schooner of 80 tons . BREHAUT & SHEPPARD . Quebec , 4th Nov , 1913 . E FOR SALE , IGHT Thousand feet Merchantable Oak Timber , 12,000 feet ship building and Oak Culls , of a good qua- lity . 7,000 feet Merchantable Pine Timber . Apply to JONES , WHITE & MELVIN Quebec , 231 Septr . 1813 . A few firkins Irish Butter , first quality . ROGERSON , HUNTER & Co , GEORGE BROWNE ( removed to No. 9 , St. George Street , Quebec , 25th Nov. 1813 , No , 8 , St. Peter Street . Upper Town ) has for sale . - Pink and White sparkling Champaigne , Royal Soutern , Claret , Malmsey Madeira , Lon NOTICE - All persons having any legal against the don particular Teneriffe , Sherry , Lisbon , Albuflor and Vin de , demand Estate of Mr. John Traie, formely of Liverpool , in Grave Wines in bottles , a constant apply of best Old Port , MONTREAL to wit . sued out of His Majesty’s Court of Kingway way adjoining the premises of the said Dominique Rouseau , Bench , holding civil pleas , inand for the and for the district of Mion - also the right of the gable ends , or murs mitges , as the treal , aforesaid , at the suit of François Metotte, of the district of Mont- same shall belong and appertain to the above described pre- mises , the whole as the said premises now are , and may be Lake Saint Francis , in the Parish of Soulanges , yeoman , found to extend , with all and every the rights , members and aid Marie Loune Poirier , his wife , against the lands and te- appurtenances thereunto belonging . And also the following nements of Clement Racicot , of the Parish of Vaudreuil , in lots of land situate , lying and being in the Township of Buck- the said district , merchant , and George Hamel , widow of ngham, in the said district, that is to say, the lot number Erienne Couturier , late of the parish of Soulanget , in the said twenty , five, in the first range ; the lot number twenty five in district , yeoman , as commune en biene , with the said Etienne the second range the lots number twenty twn , wety - laut , Couturier , and natural Turrix to her minor children , to me and twenty - five , in the third range ; and the lot nowher directed ; I have seized and taken in execution as belonging twenty-three, in the fourth range of lots in the said Town- Fogland, and late of Quebec, Merchant, deceased, are hereby to a land the situated mid GEORGE and being HAMEL at the Petite , in her cite quality de Vaudreuil aforesaid , in , ship of - Buckingham now I do hereby give notice that the acquired by the Executors , to produce , the cane duly attested bottles n , a great part of the Port nearly three years and above said lands and tenement sill be sold and adjudged to the within twelve months from this date , for adjustment And all 40 dozen bottled in London , 1809 , London Brown Stout and the parish of Vaudreuil , aforesaid , containing two argents highest bidder , at my office , in the City of Montreal , those who are indebted to the said Estate , are requested to Porter , Burton Ale , real Cogniac Brandy and Holland’s Ge- in front by twenty - eight arpents more or less , in depth ,on foresaid , on TUESDAY the THIRD day of MAY sext , at make immediate payment to neva , a few dozen choice old East - India Arrack , Jamaica Spi- the north east side of the public road of the said cote , and ELEVEN of the Clock in the forenoon , at which time and rits and Martinica Moyrau . three arpents in front , by fifteen arpents more or less , in depth , on the south west side of the said road , the whole place the conditions of sale be made known . . will FRED W. ERMATINGER, Sheriff . being bounded in the front by Dominique Charlebois , and All and every person or persons having claims on the lands Gabriel Saint Denis , in the rear by Jean Baptiste Joubert and tenements above described , by mortgage or other right on one side in part by the end of the lands at the upper and incumbrance , are hereby advertised to give notice thereof ALL persons having accounts of demands against the Subs- Queen’s ware , in Crates , each containing complete dinner of the little river Quinchien , and in part by Michel Cam or said Sheriff , at his Office , aforesaid , according to law ; pault , and on the other side by Chevrier , the father , with and further that no opposition afis faller or afin de distraire diate settlement , and all those indebted to them are requested the buildings there erected . Now I do hereby give notice the whole , or any part of the mid    lands lands and tenements  or tenements or to settle their respective accounts , as after this notice all ac that the said land and premises will be sold and adjudged to af de charge or servitude on the same , will be received by the counts which have been of more than a year’s standing , will be the highest bidder , at the Church door of the parish of aid Sherif during the fifteen days previous to the sale there - indiscriminately prosecuted for at the approaching terms Quebec , 6 Septr , 1813 . Vaudreuil , aforesaid , on MONDAY the SECOND day of d Sheriff’s Office , 234 December , 1815 . JAMES IRVINE , THOs WILSON , Executors . Quebec , 21st October , 1813 . NOTICE ALSO ... double and single refined and clay’d Sugar , West India Coffee , Florente Oil in cases , containing 12 bottles each , white wine Vinegar in Jars , of 5 to 6 gallons , Wedgwood’s cribers are hereby notified to produce them for imme - service , writing paper of various morts Patent Shor , Shot HALL & GOWEN . belts and Powder Flasks , a few pairs large dble , rows blankets , trunk best London made boots , & c . & c . N. B. The Wimes , Brandy & c . may be bad in quantities not less than two , the Porter & c . not less than three dozens. Quebec , 13th May , 1815 .
